hierarchy.classes: no bg no border text-accent underline

placement_patterns.rule: Primary on the right — matches LTR reading flow. Cancel always left of primary.

placement_patterns.layout: Cancel far left, danger action far right
placement_patterns.rule: Maximize distance between cancel and destructive (Fitts's Law — make misclick harder)

placement_patterns.layout: Left-aligned with content; centered only in hero with centered text
Full-width stacked, primary always on top
placement_patterns.rule: Full-width stacked buttons on mobile (< 640px). Primary above secondary. Min 44px height, 8px gap.

rules: One primary button per view — NEVER two primary buttons side by side
NEVER place destructive and primary buttons adjacent — always separate them
NEVER use ghost buttons as primary CTAs — they disappear visually
ALWAYS define all 5 states: default, hover, focus, disabled, loading
Destructive actions should be SMALLER and FURTHER from the primary action
Mobile: always at least h-11 (44px) on touch surfaces

input_anatomy.rule: NEVER use placeholder-only labels — placeholder disappears on focus

layout_patterns.rule: Always revert to single column on mobile (< 768px)

layout_patterns.use: Desktop only, genuinely related fields (first/last name, city/zip)
layout_patterns.rule: NEVER two columns for unrelated fields — it forces the eye to zigzag
Button height must match input height exactly

rules: Labels always ABOVE inputs — never to the left on mobile
Helper text BELOW label, before the input (not after)
Error messages BELOW the input they describe
Required indicator (*) in label, not in placeholder
NEVER rely on placeholder as the label — placeholder disappears on focus

grid_patterns.content_cards: grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4

rules: NEVER nest a bg-surface card inside another bg-surface card — step down to bg-subtle
Interactive cards need hover state: hover:border-strong hover:shadow-sm transition-all
Consistent internal padding across all cards of same type
Border-radius matches context: rounded-xl standalone, rounded-lg inside panels

top_nav.layout: Logo top-left | Primary nav center or left-of-center | Auth/CTA top-right
top_nav.active_state: accent color text + optional accent underline (2px bottom border)

mobile.hamburger: Full-screen overlay slides in from left, closes with × top-right

rules: Logo always top-left
Auth actions / CTA always top-right
Active nav item must be visually distinct (not just bold)
Mobile navigation must be defined before shipping

anatomy.footer: p-4, border-t, flex justify-end — Cancel left, Primary right

rules: Modal always centered vertically and horizontally
Overlay click closes modal (unless destructive action is in progress)
ESC key always closes modal
Focus trapped inside modal when open (accessibility)
Never stack two modals — use a wizard/stepper pattern instead
Mobile: modals become bottom sheets (slide up from bottom, full width)

buttons: Exactly one primary button per view
Destructive action separated from primary action spatially
All 5 button states defined: default, hover, focus, disabled, loading
Cancel is left of confirm, never right
forms: All inputs have visible labels (not placeholder-only)
Helper text below label, error message below input
All 5 input states defined: default, focus, error, success, disabled
Required fields marked in label with *
cards_layout: No bg-surface card nested inside another bg-surface card
Consistent internal padding across all cards of same type
Shadow level matches actual Z-axis position of element
Interactive cards have hover state defined
navigation: Active state visually distinct (not just bold)
Mobile navigation defined (hamburger or bottom tabs)
